topic: Mahjong Mirror Financial Decision Framework — Money Week

images.prompt: A flat-lay arrangement of Mahjong tiles spread in a diamond pattern on a dark lacquered wood surface. One tile is face-up at the center, showing a coin or wealth character. Warm amber candlelight falls from one side, casting soft shadows. A folded paper or document with handwritten notes is partially visible at the edge of the frame. The mood is contemplative and purposeful. No people. No text overlay. Chinese aesthetic with modern minimalism.

Close-up of two hands resting on either side of a Mahjong tile spread on a dark table. One tile in the center position is face-up. The hands are calm, not tense — the posture of someone considering, not anxious. Warm side-lighting. The rest of the tiles are slightly out of focus. Mood: focused, intentional, grounded. No text. Cinematic composition.

A single Mahjong tile held between two fingers — the tile face shows a coin or metal character. Background is a deep charcoal or navy, slightly blurred. Warm candlelight from below illuminates the tile. Square format. Minimal composition, high contrast between the warm tile and dark background. Mood: deliberate, ancient, powerful. No text.

An open notebook on a wooden desk, alongside several Mahjong tiles arranged in a small spread. A pen rests across the page. Natural window light fills the scene. The notebook page has a few lines written but remains largely open — suggesting active decision-making rather than finished analysis. Warm, organized, purposeful aesthetic. No text overlay. No faces.

Overhead shot of a hand placing a Mahjong tile onto a spread of four tiles arranged in a diamond pattern on a dark surface. The hand is mid-action. The tiles have Chinese characters. Natural or candlelight from the side. Square crop. Cinematic, deliberate, ritualistic mood. No people beyond the hand. No text.
